note: This case is from SQLancer bugs.json. The executable SQL strips report comments; the oracle is the stable signature observed on the current sqlite3 binary.
original_test: CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0(((LIKELIHOOD(1, 2)) AND ((1 IN ())))); -- unexpected: no error
ALTER TABLE t0 RENAME TO t1; -- -- error occurs only here: second argument to likelihood() must be a constant between 0.0 and 1.0
title: Another case of Illegal argument to LIKELIHOOD() does not result in error when combined with "IN ()"
